The [[Mobquet Swoops and Speeders/Legends|Mobquet Swoops and Speeders]] '''Asteroid-3 Swoop Racer''' was a popular vehicle with a flight ceiling of 35 [[Meter/Legends|meters]]. It was rather basic in its design, being little more than a chair mounted behind a [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsor]] engine, with stabilizer foils stretched out in front.

{{Veh-stub}}
